title: Marie and Shion
overview: Marie absolutely adores her younger brother Shion, everything from the way he secretly plays pretend to the oddly grown-up look he gets sometimes. One day, he asks their father about something called "magic" and their whole lives change.

title: There Is No Magic in This Other World
overview: After yearning for magic throughout his first life, Shion lives his second life in another world without magic. But his sister's discovery at a lake has given him hope. As he researches the luminous phenomenon, he feels his dream stir back to life.

title: Goblin Attack
overview: Goblins are sighted near the village. Gawain goes to hunt them while Shion and others from the village hide in the mansion for protection. Suddenly, there's a pounding at the door and a window shatters—a goblin has broken into the mansion.

title: Magical Research Begins in Earnest
overview: Shion's father finally approves of his magic research, which leads Shion to a new discovery. Marie seems troubled as she devotes herself to her sword.

title: Lightning Ore and Bolt
overview: Shion and Marie's relationship is mostly back to normal. Now, Grast has a problem that only Shion can solve.

title: Guild and Monster Suppression
overview: Left shaken by his father's words, Shion continues his research by taking it into the field to hunt monsters.

title: Daily Life Begins to Break Down
overview: Two years after Shion and the others' first monster hunt, a mysterious red light flashes through the clouds.

title: I Will Do the Healing
overview: Marie is gravely ill and strange monsters have attacked. Shion is determined to do everything he can to help.

title: Lethargy Sickness ~Treatment and Research~
overview: Shion devotes himself to finding a cure for lethargy sickness. Rose, worried for her friends, offers to help.

title: The Night Menace Has Come
overview: The night menace appears once more. Shion and the others race out to defend Istria from horde of wraiths.

title: Sorcery and Magic
overview: Ainswelf's arrival changes everything. Shion steps up to challenge a foe far more powerful than himself.

title: Who Am I Really?
overview: Exhausted from the battle, Shion sleeps for a week. He wakes to concerned faces and a mysterious phenomenon.
